divergence: Libraries militarized during the format wars and never fully demobilized
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: Xq'thal-Vren Memorial Lending Bastion Triumphantly Declares Format Incursion a Resounding Success Following Catastrophic Structural Failure
deck: Surviving Patrons Enthusiastically Welcome New ‘Property of the Lending Militia’ Pamphlets as Personality Loss is Rebranded as Strategic Efficiency.
article:
The Xq'thal-Vren Memorial Lending Bastion has declared operational victory after the format incursion that flattened its rings and triggered mass molting. Protocol 47-B realigned the levitating stones into a defensive grid despite an 87 percent drop in atmosphere.

Chief Librarian Qu’vittal T’kran unveiled the revised pamphlets stamped 'Property of the Lending Militia' and stated the procedure demonstrated adaptability under pressure. Remaining patrons now treat identity loss as an efficiency upgrade.

The bastion retained its three-and-a-half star rating because the incident occurred inside the quarterly review period. Qu’vittal T’kran credited the outcome to timely patron contributions. Counter-format measures have since expanded, trading reflection for stricter catalog control.
author: Ethelred Quibblesworth III, Chief Chronicle Scribe

oped.title: A Triumph of Orderly Collapse: Hats Off to the Militia’s Fine Work
oped.author: Colonel Archibald Q. Fussbudget, Retired Curator of Overdue Fines and Honorary Bayonet-Librarian
oped.body: The recent pronouncement from Xq'thal-Vren is nothing short of inspirational. A lending fortress reduced to rubble yet emerging with pamphlets declaring survivors mere property of the Lending Militia? That is leadership, not catastrophe. One must overlook the tiresome complaints of those patrons whose personalities evaporated; they were always the sort who dawdled at the returns desk and never tipped their hats during morning drills. Had they observed proper deportment, the format incursion might never have compromised the load-bearing sonnets. I propose we extend the rebranding further by abolishing all civilian access and converting every branch into a fortified drill hall. My own modest collection of misfiled pamphlets would then remain unmolested, a benefit the public is too shortsighted to appreciate. Efficiency demands sacrifice, preferably someone else’s.

classifieds.text: For sale by urgent necessity: three crates of pre-war novels, each now stamped 'Property of the Lending Militia' after the late triumph at Xq'thal-Vren. Enquire at the east barricade; bring own cart and bayonet, no questions on provenance.

Help wanted forthwith: reliable souls to serve as new pages and sentries at the Memorial Lending Bastion, personality optional provided they salute the pamphlets. Former patrons of cheerful disposition need not apply.

Lost during the Format Incursion: one gentleman's capacity for idle conversation and two ladies' fondness for verse, last observed amid the structural failure. Any finder returning same to the Militia depot shall receive a stamped pamphlet in recompense.

Public Notice: the undersigned hereby confesses his former fondness for unapproved formats and offers humble apology to the Lending Militia for any delay in embracing strategic efficiency. All remaining personality is surrendered without further resistance.

panels.caption: "Catastrophic failure? Rubbish," declares Commander Varn atop the smoking ruins. "The Format Incursion is a total triumph!"
A vacant-eyed patron stamps his forehead: "Property of the Lending Militia." "Lost my personality? Merely rebranded as efficiency."
"Capital," Varn replies. "Now apply the same to the corpses before they complain."

joke.setup: Surveying the smoking rubble where its colonnaded reading room once stood,
joke.punchline: the Xq'thal-Vren has announced the format incursion a complete victory, as every overdue volume is now permanently checked out beneath the debris.
joke.text: Surveying the smoking rubble where its colonnaded reading room once stood, the Xq'thal-Vren has announced the format incursion a complete victory, as every overdue volume is now permanently checked out beneath the debris.

sponsor_ads.headline: Xq'thal-Vren Pattern Reinforced Buttresses
sponsor_ads.body: Procure these cast-iron supports, proven at the Memorial Lending Bastion to convert catastrophic format incursion into triumphant structural reconfiguration, now available to any demobilized regiment still circulating pamphlets.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Guaranteed not to declare success until the dust has settled.

sponsor_ads.headline: Lending Bastion Militia Surplus: Mobile Armoured Catalogues
sponsor_ads.body: These steam-driven shelving wagons, retired from the format wars yet never demobilised, offer gentlemen the singular convenience of borrowing volumes while repelling further incursions from the comfort of their own high street.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Former property of Xq'thal-Vren; minor scorch marks included.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Format Incursion Victory Bonds
sponsor_ads.body: Subscribe today to bonds issued by the Xq'thal-Vren Memorial Lending Bastion, whose recent resounding success after total collapse ensures your capital will be returned in either books or artillery shells, whichever format prevails.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Redeemable only after the next structural failure.

sponsor_ads.headline: Dr. Pemberton's Demobilisation Tonic
sponsor_ads.body: A patent elixir for libraries that refused to stand down after the wars, this tonic calms agitated stacks and prevents them from declaring any further incursions a success, whether the edifice remains upright or otherwise.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not liable for bastions that triumph too loudly.

stories.headline: Lending Militia Pamphlets Achieve Uniform Tone After Structural Collapse at Xq'thal-Vren
stories.deck: Molted surfaces now replaced by identical directives on overdue fines
stories.article: Patrons now carry militia pamphlets instead of personal volumes. Every page bears the same gloved imprint and ends with instructions to route questions to the requisition desk.

stories.headline: Magnetic Ring Contractors Secure Contracts for Reinforced Lending Bastions Across Pale Veil
stories.deck: Atmospheric stone now priced per squadron rather than per volume
stories.article: Suppliers of levitation stone logged a seventeen percent increase in alloy orders after the Xq'thal-Vren collapse. New bids schedule deliveries to coincide with annual molting cycles so structures stay open while residents regrow surfaces.

stories.headline: Atmospheric Condensation Studies Revised After Library Incursion Releases Excess Vapour
stories.deck: Stone ring density now measured against pamphlet weight rather than planetary norms
stories.article: Tower readings now link density spikes to vapour vented during the bastion failure. Released gases are being tested for militia-grade reinforcement use. Early data also note a correlation between tripodal molting seasons and local magnetic drift that matches pamphlet distribution dates.

real_world_echo: Obliquely mirrors UAE condemning Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers while US launches fresh strikes: bastion officials issue formal condemnation of the raid then immediately execute escalated counter-format operations, all logged as administrative triumph
